ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the team */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the league */,
  "pro_bowl_appearances" INTEGER /* Number of Pro Bowl appearances */,
  "super_bowl_wins" INTEGER /* Number of Super Bowl wins */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team is part of */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium name and location */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "offensive_scheme" TEXT /* Type of offense the team runs */,
  "defensive_scheme" TEXT /* Type of defense the team runs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the performance */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored in the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the game */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Passing yards thrown by the player */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Rushing yards gained by the player */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions made by the player */,
  "targets" INTEGER /* Number of targets received by the player */,
  "drops" INTEGER /* Number of drops by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_key" INTEGER /* Game key for external reference */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the game took place */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of day the game was played */,
  "game_day" TEXT /* Day of the week the game was played */,
  "opponent" INTEGER /* Opponent team's ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "tweet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the tweet is related to */,
  "tweet_date" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "tweet_content" TEXT /* Content of the tweet */,
  "last_tweet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last tweet for the player */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the tweet */,
  "engagement" INTEGER /* Engagement metrics of the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweets_since_last_game" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet count record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "tweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of tweets since the last game */,
  "last_game_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last game */,
  "tweet_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of tweets since the last game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_since_last_game_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_fantasy_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fantasy team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the fantasy team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team is part of */,
  "team_value" REAL /* Total value of the fantasy team */,
  "team_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the fantasy team in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_fantasy_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_fantasy_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "user_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the user has been playing fantasy football */,
  "user_skill_level" TEXT /* Skill level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "commissioner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the league commissioner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the league */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the league */,
  "league_size" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "league_type" TEXT /* Type of league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_team_players" (
  "team_player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-player relationship */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fantasy team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date the player was added to the team */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the fantasy team */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Status of the player on the fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_team_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES user_fantasy_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_team_players_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injured player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the news is about */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the news was published */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_type" TEXT /* Type of news */,
  "news_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the news on the player's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_news_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "predicted_points" REAL /* Predicted fantasy points for the game */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_source" TEXT /* Source of the prediction */,
  "prediction_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_predictions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_predictions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the game */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the game */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the game */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the game */,
  "weather_impact" TEXT /* Potential impact of the weather on player performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_weather_conditions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
